text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After a day out with Mayano Top Gun, she says
she has to stop somewhere...
choice_data_list: Did you leave something in the academy?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
That's not it! Listen up, I actually heard about this
crazy superstition today!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
They say that if two people stand together on a
roof with their hearts pounding beneath a starry
sky, they're destined to be happy!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Eee! ☆ It's so romantic!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Sounds fun, right?! Let's head to the roof! Hurry!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Yay! So now we'll—hold up!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Th-that's right! Um, if someone catches us, then it
won't work!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Do you copy?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: All right! Time to take off... in stealth mode! ☆

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Maya One to all aircraft! No sign of the enemy.
Over!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe! I'm so excited I might zoom right to the
roof!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Pitter-patter... pitter-patter!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Did you hear that?!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: And they're coming this way! What should we do?!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: O-okay! There's a classroom—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Pitter-patter...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
...Ehehe, it kinda feels like we're playing
hide-and-seek. I'm getting nervous.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Ahh! You're right! Gotta be quiet. Shhh...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
(Hehe... Trainer's eyelashes are so cute. I love
how they curl up just a little. ♪）

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: (Actually, Trainer seems... cooler than usual...)

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: ...Wheeze ...Wheeze.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: ...I can't do this anymore!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! ☆ Where'd you come from, Mayano?! Did
you forget something in the classroom too?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: H-huh? Marvey?
choice_data_list: Looks like our cover's been blown.
Looks like our cover's been blown.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Oh no! You're right! I was in such a panic I totally
forgot!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
I see! Were you headed to the roof to test out
that good luck ritual? Hm, but...

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
I hope you were able to get your hearts
pumping! ☆ That's so marvelous! ★

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Hm... I guess you're right. Even if we didn't
complete the ritual...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Uh, nothing! Nothing at all! Anyway, we've been
found out, so let's just get home!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Still unsure of what Mayano Top Gun meant by
"ritual," we head back.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Got it! Let's fly as fast as we can so no one finds
us!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Take my hand!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I can go Machs faster than you! C'mon, we don't
have time for this!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She takes my hand, and we race away from the
approaching footsteps...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Run, Trainer, run! We're almost there!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: And we made it! Good job!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Now that we're finally here, we can—

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Whoa! The sky! Look up!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Incredible! Do the stars always twinkle like that?!
choice_data_list: This makes all the hard work totally worth it!
This makes all the hard work totally worth it!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... That has to be it! The stars are this pretty
'cause we both worked so hard to see them!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: ...All right! I guess it's time to head home!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
According to the rumor, we have to be together
on a roof with our hearts pounding beneath a
starry sky...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Yep! Time to return to base! I figured it out
earlier anyway.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Even if we don't do anything, the two of us will...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
A-actually, it's nothing! Forget I said anything!
Let's hurry up and go home!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With an innocent blush across Mayano Top Gun's
cheeks, we head home beneath a sky illuminated
by countless brilliant stars.
